standard_instruction: Segment seg_1b_001 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 first performs reconnaissance on area_A as task t1_recon_area_a. Then fleet_1 performs strike on target_A as task t2_strike_target_a. Add a sequence dependency from t1_recon_area_a to t2_strike_target_a. Add a deadline of 10.0 for t2_strike_target_a.

standard_instruction: Segment seg_1b_002 uses actors fleet_1 and fleet_2. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on area_A as t1_fleet1_recon_area_a. fleet_2 performs strike on target_B as t2_fleet2_strike_target_b. Add a parallel dependency from t1_fleet1_recon_area_a to t2_fleet2_strike_target_b.

standard_instruction: Segment seg_1b_003 uses actors fleet_1 and fleet_2. fleet_1 performs rendezvous at point_A as t1_fleet1_rendezvous. fleet_2 performs rendezvous at point_A as t2_fleet2_rendezvous. Add a sync dependency between t1_fleet1_rendezvous and t2_fleet2_rendezvous with sync_tolerance 0.5.

standard_instruction: Segment seg_1b_004 uses actors fleet_1, fleet_2 and fleet_3. Add three rendezvous tasks at point_A: t1_fleet1_ready for fleet_1, t2_fleet2_ready for fleet_2 and t3_fleet3_ready for fleet_3. Add one group_sync constraint over these three task ids with tolerance 0.5, mode start and source_label group_sync_ready_start.

notes: migrated from standard NL legacy case
standard_instruction: Segment seg_1b_005 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on target_A as t1_recon_target_a. After condition target_A_confirmed, fleet_1 performs strike on target_A as t2_strike_target_a. Add a condition_trigger dependency from t1_recon_target_a to t2_strike_target_a with condition target_A_confirmed.

notes: migrated from standard NL legacy case
standard_instruction: Segment seg_1b_006 uses actor fleet_1. Create five strike tasks for fleet_1: t1_strike_a on target_A, t2_strike_b on target_B, t3_strike_c on target_C, t4_strike_d on target_D and t5_strike_e on target_E. Add sequence dependencies from t1_strike_a to t2_strike_b, t2_strike_b to t3_strike_c, t3_strike_c to t4_strike_d and t4_strike_d to t5_strike_e.

notes: migrated from standard NL legacy case
standard_instruction: Segment seg_1b_007 uses actor fleet_3. fleet_3 flies from initial to hq_mark6 as t1_fly_to_mark6. Then fleet_3 jams hq_mark6 as t2_jam_mark6. Then fleet_3 flies from hq_mark6 to hq_mark7 as t3_fly_to_mark7. Add sequence dependencies from t1_fly_to_mark6 to t2_jam_mark6 and from t2_jam_mark6 to t3_fly_to_mark7. Add a deadline of 30.0 for t3_fly_to_mark7. Add physical feasibility for t1_fly_to_mark6 with distance 30.0 km and speed 70.0 km/h, and for t3_fly_to_mark7 with distance 10.0 km and speed 70.0 km/h.

standard_instruction: Segment seg_1b_008 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 tracks area_C as task t1_track_area_c. Then fleet_1 strikes target_C as task t2_strike_target_c. Add a sequence dependency from t1_track_area_c to t2_strike_target_c. Add a deadline of 12.0 for t2_strike_target_c.

standard_instruction: Segment seg_1b_010 uses actor fleet_9. fleet_9 performs reconnaissance on target_D as t1_recon_target_d. Then fleet_9 performs strike on target_F as t4_strike_target_f. Add a condition_trigger dependency from t1_recon_target_d to t2_strike_target_d with condition target_D_confirmed, a sequence dependency from t2_strike_target_d to t3_strike_target_e, and a sequence dependency from t3_strike_target_e to t4_strike_target_f.
